title: Spicy Korean Chicken Skewers
description: Tender and flavorful chicken skewers marinated in a spicy Korean-inspired sauce. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, and gochujang. Blend until smooth.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the chicken with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the chicken for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Brush the chicken with the marinade during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before serving.
